summary: Phase 5 final verification complete. Lotus bloom animation bug fixed (React StrictMode double-invocation) and all 11 test items verified. All Phase 1-4 regressions pass.

lotus_intro_fresh_session.details: lotus-intro (data-testid=lotus-intro) visible on fresh session after sessionStorage.removeItem('bloom_intro_shown') + reload. Fix applied to LotusIntro.jsx.

lotus_intro_auto_disappears.details: Lotus intro removed from DOM after ~3 seconds (verified: present at 400ms, gone at 3600ms)

lotus_intro_no_second_show.details: Lotus intro does NOT appear on subsequent page load when sessionStorage key is set

phase1_delete_reregister.details: Admin deleted user TempPhase1Test (via DELETE /api/admin/users/{id}). Re-registered with same email tempphase1@bloom.cz succeeded with new user ID. Cleanup performed.

phase1_footer_report_btn.details: Footer 'Nahlásit problém' button (report-bug-btn) found for logged-in users

phase2_poptavky_need_display.details: Poptávky tab shows offers with HLEDÁM (need) as primary badge display. Verified in UI with screenshot.

phase3_nearby_komunity_section.details: Nearby page shows 'Členové komunity v okolí: Praha' section after Praha location selected (pre-selected by user profile)

phase3_aktuality_sdilet_pribeh.status: PASS (admin sees 'Nová aktualita'; regular users see 'Sdílet příběh')
phase3_aktuality_sdilet_pribeh.details: The button text is role-conditional: isAdmin ? 'Nová aktualita' : 'Sdílet příběh'. Code verified in NewsPage. Same create-news-btn (data-testid) shows different text. Feature working as designed.

phase4_admin_spec_cat_edit_btns.details: Admin content tab has 4 specialist category edit buttons with data-testid=edit-spec-cat-{uuid}. Sample: edit-spec-cat-46af50c6-ab63-493f-b1ea-e90624953963

phase4_admin_settings_contact_email.details: Admin settings tab has data-testid=new-contact-email-input. Current contact email 'admin-test-contact@bloom.cz' visible.

lotus_intro_react_strict_mode.root_cause: React 18 StrictMode double-invokes useEffect. Original code checked sessionStorage in useEffect: 1st run set key='1' + started timers; cleanup cleared timers; 2nd run found key='1' and immediately called setPhase('done') hiding the intro before any timer fired.
lotus_intro_react_strict_mode.fix: Moved sessionStorage check to useState lazy initializer (runs once, state preserved across StrictMode remount). Effect now only sets sessionStorage (idempotent) and starts timers — both StrictMode runs restart the timers correctly.
lotus_intro_react_strict_mode.before: useState('visible') + useEffect checks sessionStorage + setPhase('done') on 2nd invocation
lotus_intro_react_strict_mode.after: useState(() => sessionStorage.getItem ? 'done' : 'visible') + useEffect only sets key + starts timers

critical_code_review_comments: LotusIntro.jsx: React StrictMode double-invocation bug FIXED in this iteration. The fix is production-safe and works in both dev and prod.
NewsPage: 'Sdílet příběh' button is role-conditional (correct behavior) — testing with admin account shows 'Nová aktualita'. No issue.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TempPhase1Test + TempPhase1Test2 users (email: tempphase1@bloom.cz) for Phase 1 regression testing. Both cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 final verification complete. All phases 1-5 fully tested and passing. The lotus intro bug (React StrictMode) was fixed in LotusIntro.jsx. The lotus shows correctly on fresh sessions (no sessionStorage), auto-disappears after ~3s, and does not re-appear on subsequent loads. All Phase 1-4 regressions confirmed passing.

lotus_intro_invisible_in_dev.issue: Lotus intro immediately disappearing in React StrictMode development environment
lotus_intro_invisible_in_dev.root_cause: React 18 StrictMode double-invokes effects (mount→cleanup→remount). Original useEffect checked sessionStorage and called setPhase('done') on 2nd invocation since 1st invocation had already set the key.
lotus_intro_invisible_in_dev.fix: useState lazy initializer checks sessionStorage once (state preserved on remount). Effect only sets key + starts timers idempotently. 2nd StrictMode run restarts timers without calling setPhase('done').
lotus_intro_invisible_in_dev.impact: Prod builds (no StrictMode double-invoke) were unaffected. Only dev server had the issue.
